scripts.build: npm run build -w @tenantify/core && npm run build -w @tenantify/config && npm run build -w @tenantify/identity && npm run build -w @tenantify/dev-proxy && npm run build -w @tenantify/react && npm run build -w @tenantify/next-app && npm run build -w @tenantify/next-pages && npm run build -w @tenantify/express && npm run build -w @tenantify/nest && npm run build -w @tenantify/cli
